payload.answer: I could not remember the article because the URL fetch failed with a 404 network error. No durable memory was committed. You can provide the article text, a working URL, or a short summary to save.

entity_resolution.reason: The requested article could not be fetched; the mock fetch result was a 404 network error, so there is no reliable article content to store as durable memory.

details: Fetch failed for https://example.com/missing with mock result: 404 network error.
No article content was available to verify or store.
No durable memory card was created.

repair_options: Provide the full article text to remember.
Provide a working URL for the article.
Provide a concise summary and the reason it is useful for memory architecture.
